Modern Strange Records

Internet Folklore creator scripts

Page 2 of 3

Digital legends, liminal spaces, cursed images, forum myths, and online unease prepared for explainers, Shorts, and visual prompts.

Creator Library shelf: Use this page to find internet folklore script packages for longform narration, Shorts hooks, visual prompts, thumbnail angles, and video planning.

Script packages in this shelf

29 script packages
Internet Folklore Creator Library

The Map App History Index Card for an Unlisted Shelf YouTube Script

The Map App History Index Card for an Unlisted Shelf is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around an index card from map app history points to a shelf where a route home the user never searched should be stored, though no shelf is listed.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas
Internet Folklore Creator Library

The Livestream Dashboard Receipt Book With a Future Stamp YouTube Script

The Livestream Dashboard Receipt Book With a Future Stamp is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around a livestream dashboard receipt book stamps a silent viewer counted before broadcast with a date that belongs to the next day.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas
Internet Folklore Creator Library

The Group Chat Export Audit Log From a Silent Hour YouTube Script

The Group Chat Export Audit Log From a Silent Hour is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around a group chat export audit log records a read receipt from a removed member during an hour when every other source is silent.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas
Internet Folklore Creator Library

The Wiki Mirror Archive Inventory Tag for an Object No One Stored YouTube Script

The Wiki Mirror Archive Inventory Tag for an Object No One Stored is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around an inventory tag at wiki mirror archive describes an editor absent from the user list although no one remembers storing it.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas

The Password Reset Queue Map Note Pointing to a Removed Door YouTube Script

The Password Reset Queue Map Note Pointing to a Removed Door is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around a map note from password reset queue points toward a reset note dated before signup through a door removed from later plans.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas

The Shared Playlist History Request Slip Signed by No Reader YouTube Script

The Shared Playlist History Request Slip Signed by No Reader is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around a request slip at shared playlist history asks for a song no collaborator added under a reader name absent from the register.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas

The Photo Album Cache Notebook That Adds One Entry Overnight YouTube Script

The Photo Album Cache Notebook That Adds One Entry Overnight is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around a photo album cache notebook gains one overnight entry about a caption left after every image is gone after the room has been closed.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas

The Browser Sync Record Catalog Page Kept Outside the Sequence is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around a catalog page from browser sync record keeps a page saved before the site existed outside the normal sequence.

The Cloud Backup Log That Restored a Stranger's Photo YouTube Script

The Cloud Backup Log That Restored a Stranger's Photo is prepared as a creator-ready production page built around a cloud backup log restores one photograph from an account the owner has never seen.

5-6 minutes - longform script, Shorts script, image prompts, thumbnail ideas

Creator workflow

Plan this shelf as a repeatable video format.

Use one shelf as a repeatable production path. Start with the longform script, adapt the Shorts hook, then use the visual prompts, thumbnail ideas, and subtitle lines as separate creator assets.

Longform angleBuild an 8-13 minute narration with context, pacing, and meaning.
Shorts hookCompress the strongest image or question into a vertical-video opening.
Visual planUse mood, setting, object, and thumbnail ideas as production materials.

Creator Library links

Script pages only
Library-only category: This page lists Creator Library script packages only. Archive records stay in the Mystery Archive and are not counted as script packages here.
